creator: mike.jakubik@intertainservices.com
text:
Thanks, but i made a typo in the pkg-plist file (wrong case in 
filename), below is an updated version of the patch.

diff -urN openx.orig/Makefile openx/Makefile
--- openx.orig/Makefile 2009-07-07 08:44:48.000000000 -0400
+++ openx/Makefile      2009-10-21 13:40:52.000000000 -0400
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=      openx
-PORTVERSION=   2.8.1
+PORTVERSION=   2.8.2
 CATEGORIES=    www
 MASTER_SITES=  http://download.openx.org/
 
@@ -21,7 +21,7 @@
 .include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
 
 .if !defined(WITHOUT_PHP_DEPENDS)
-USE_PHP=       xml pcre zlib mysql pgsql ftp
+USE_PHP=       xml pcre zlib mysql pgsql ftp spl session
 .endif
 
 do-install:
diff -urN openx.orig/distinfo openx/distinfo
--- openx.orig/distinfo 2009-07-07 08:44:48.000000000 -0400
+++ openx/distinfo      2009-10-21 11:42:54.000000000 -0400
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (openx-2.8.1.tar.bz2) = f4c22d1259788f8e1d1ed56a2f7cf81b
-SHA256 (openx-2.8.1.tar.bz2) = 
d37999685b62175716d8be9c1479dbf5e417899cbd78211ff5321420f64fd36b
-SIZE (openx-2.8.1.tar.bz2) = 7445761
+MD5 (openx-2.8.2.tar.bz2) = ab164e6dae94a6bcd8acff7e4938ea32
+SHA256 (openx-2.8.2.tar.bz2) = 
df7d6fe83996da4bf054d1a47b2dc0dda10099d7416987731a85840cba53921b
+SIZE (openx-2.8.2.tar.bz2) = 7560755
